visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, wearing a patterned flat cap and a mustard-yellow hoodie, stands in front of a neutral grey background. He points his finger upward and speaks to the camera with an animated expression. (2) The scene cuts to a digital world map overlay with red 'SCAM ALERT' warning icons flickering. An animation of a woman in a black dress throwing money into the air follows. (3) The visual shifts to a dim office environment filled with multiple computer monitors displaying green audio waveforms. (4) An elderly woman with short grey hair and large glasses (Daisy) is shown in various close-up shots, talking into a telephone. In one shot, she holds a black handset, and in another, a pink one. (5) A young woman with blonde hair is shown in a small inset, sitting in a modern office, holding a mug and smiling while watching a screen that shows Daisy. (6) Daisy is seen again, this time with a tabby cat perched on her shoulder as she continues to talk on the phone. (7) The video returns to the man in the yellow hoodie, who continues his enthusiastic explanation with hand gestures, ending with a pointing gesture toward the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: miko 米可 手機館. [Subtitle]: 英國利用AI. (2) [Slogan]: 打造詐騙剋星!. [Variety]: SCAM ALERT. [Subtitle]: 2023年全球消費者. [Subtitle]: 因網路詐騙損失超過一兆美元. (3) [Subtitle]: 為了阻擋這個詐騙的猖狂. [Subtitle]: 英國電信公司. [Subtitle]: 以員工的祖母為原型. (4) [Slogan]: AI阿嬤 Daisy. [Subtitle]: 打造出能與詐騙集團自主對話的. [Subtitle]: I'm your worst nightmare. (5) [Subtitle]: 這名AI阿嬤黛西. [Subtitle]: 她本身擁有多組的電話號碼. (6) [Subtitle]: 藉此增加詐騙集團找上黛西的機率. [Variety]: 「已讀亂回」. (7) [Subtitle]: 黛西目前接到超過一千多通的詐騙電話. [Subtitle]: 浪費詐騙集團數百個小時. [Subtitle]: 列為警戒名單. [Subtitle]: 讓他們沒有餘力去詐騙其他人.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 elderly female AI persona, 1 young female observer.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a patterned tweed flat cap and a mustard yellow hoodie with a graphic print.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean studio background for the narrator; a digital map graphic for statistics; a dark server/monitor room; a cozy domestic living room setting for the elderly woman; and a brightly lit modern office for the observer.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, rhythmic electronic BGM featuring a steady synth beat. A male speaker introduces the topic with high vocal arousal and clear articulation, delivering information at a brisk rate. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as visual graphics shift to a scam alert map. The BGM remains consistent in the background, providing a driving energy. (3) A subtle digital notification 'ping' sounds as text overlays appear on the screen. The male narrator maintains a professional yet enthusiastic tone, emphasizing key figures regarding financial loss. (4) As the elderly woman's voice is briefly introduced via a low-volume audio clip, the BGM ducks slightly to allow the short English phrase 'I'm your worst nightmare' to be heard before the main narrator resumes. (5) Another percussive pop sound marks the transition to the 'Daisy' AI explanation. The narrator's pitch variability increases as he describes her 'random replying' strategy. (6) The video concludes with the narrator's voice reaching a final peak in dominance and volume as he poses a question to the audience, followed by a quick fade-out of the music track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem Context -> Solution/Innovation -> Mechanism -> Result/Impact -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about an innovative use of AI technology by a UK telecom company to combat phone scams, specifically through the creation of a 'Grandma AI' designed to waste scammers' time.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Permanent logo of 'miko' (米可手機館) at the top left and social media handles of the creator.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media tech commentary video with professional editing, integrated branding, and a clear, engaging narrative.
